# LargeFixture

A fixture entry file sized to exercise the large-file branch of
deep-analyzer prompt generation (>= 10KB).

## Section — Workflow rule block 1

- Don't push to main directly. Open a PR.
- Don't skip tests locally before pushing.
- Don't force-push to a shared branch.
- Don't commit files from other users sessions.

## Section — Style rule block 1

- Prefer named constants over magic numbers.
- Use descriptive variable names.
- Keep functions under 50 lines where possible.
- Write docstrings for every exported symbol.

## Section — Filler block 1

This paragraph is filler content included so the fixture crosses the
10KB threshold that deep-analyzer treats as the large-entry regime.
It contains no rules and no PII; it is purely a size padding.
